summary: Initialized the Diazites AI Marketing Platform foundation with Next.js App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, Supabase client/middleware setup, auth flows (signup/login/reset), onboarding capture, dashboard/admin scaffolds, lead intake API with OpenAI+Resend follow-up pipeline, and full Supabase schema/seed SQL including RLS policies.
current_status: Project now has a production-ready baseline architecture for Phases 1-4 plus core implementations for Phases 5, 6, 10, and 14 scaffolding; lint and build pass locally, pending env wiring and continued feature completion for CRM, campaigns, reports charts, billing UI, template library, and deeper admin modules.
